error.unknown_command: Unknown command: /{name}. Type /help for available commands.

token.title: Token usage · {short}
token.empty: No token usage recorded for this thread yet.

hitl.card_intro: The agent wants to run the following tool(s):
hitl.card_footer: Reply with `/approve` to allow, or `/reject [reason]` to deny.
hitl.none_pending: No pending tool approval for this conversation.
hitl.invalid_pending_id: No pending approval with ID `{pending_id}`. Use `/pending` to list or `/approve` without an ID for the latest.
hitl.not_owner: Only the user who started this turn can approve or reject.
hitl.expired: This approval request has expired. Send a new message to retry.
hitl.followup_pending: Another tool is waiting for your approval.
hitl.pending_empty: No pending tool approvals in this session.
hitl.dashboard_hint: Tool approval in chat uses the approval card in the dashboard, or `/approve` / `/reject` in IM channels.

delete.active: Cannot delete the active thread. Use /new first.

delegate.same_agent: Cannot delegate to the same agent.

stop.empty: No active generation to stop for this session.

help.label: Help
help.description: List available slash commands by category

status.label: Session status
status.description: Agent, owner, workspace, model, usage, and session info

model.label: Model
model.description: Show, set, or reset the model override for this thread

new.label: New chat
new.description: Clear context and start a new conversation thread

compact.label: Compact memory
compact.description: Archive current context and start a fresh thread

history.label: Conversation stats
history.description: Show message count and thread metadata

token.label: Token usage
token.description: Show token usage for the current thread

switch.label: Switch thread
switch.description: Switch to a historical thread by short id

resume.label: Resume previous
resume.description: Switch back to the previous thread, or /resume <short_id>

approve.label: Approve tools
approve.description: Approve a paused tool execution (IM channels)

reject.label: Reject tools
reject.description: Reject a paused tool execution with an optional reason

pending.label: Pending approvals
pending.description: List tool approvals waiting for your decision

delete.label: Delete thread
delete.description: Delete a thread by short id (not the active one)

unpin.label: Unpin thread
unpin.description: Remove pin from the current thread

cron.label: Cron jobs
cron.description: List scheduled cron jobs for this agent

agent.label: Agents
agent.description: List or switch the active agent

skills.label: Skills
skills.description: List installed skills for this agent

errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.LOGIN_LOCKED: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
errors.AGENT_NAME_TAKEN: This name is already in use. Please choose another.
errors.PROVIDER_NAME_TAKEN: Provider name is already in use.
errors.PROVIDER_REFERENCED: Provider is in use and cannot be removed.
errors.STORAGE_BACKEND_NAME_TAKEN: Storage backend name is already in use.
errors.STORAGE_BACKEND_REFERENCED: Storage backend is in use and cannot be removed.
errors.CHANNEL_NAME_TAKEN: This channel name is already in use. Please choose another.
errors.CONNECTOR_NOT_BOUND: Connector is not bound to this agent.
errors.VOICE_BROWSER_ONLY: Voice input is only available in the browser.
errors.TLS_NOT_ELIGIBLE: TLS issuance is not available in the current server configuration.
errors.TLS_ISSUE_IN_PROGRESS: A certificate issuance task is already running.
errors.TLS_DOMAIN_MISMATCH: The domain does not match the existing certificate.
errors.WORKSPACE_OP_UNSUPPORTED: This workspace backend does not support that file operation.
errors.SKILL_IMPORT_UNSUPPORTED_URL: This skill URL source is not supported.
errors.SKILL_ALREADY_EXISTS: Skill {name} already exists. Enable overwrite to replace it.
errors.DESKTOP_SESSION_LIMIT: Too many concurrent remote desktop streams (max {limit}). Close other connections and try again.
errors.DESKTOP_CAPTURE_FAILED: Screen capture failed repeatedly. On Linux servers restart the virtual desktop; on macOS grant Screen Recording and Accessibility, then reconnect.

desktop.install_log_host_ready: Host desktop is ready on this platform.
desktop.install_log_remove_system: Removing virtual desktop files and services…
desktop.deps_reason: Remote desktop Python dependencies are not installed.
desktop.error_script_missing: Desktop install script is missing from the Octop package.
desktop.error_sudo_required: Root or passwordless sudo is required to install the virtual desktop.
desktop.error_sudo_uninstall_required: Root or passwordless sudo is required to uninstall the virtual desktop.
desktop.error_pip_unavailable: pip/uv is not available to install desktop dependencies.
desktop.error_pip_remove_skipped: Skipping Python package removal (pip/uv not available).
desktop.error_setup_timeout: Desktop setup timed out. Refresh status and retry if needed.
desktop.error_vnc_exposed: VNC port is exposed on the network; restart with -localhost yes (only 127.0.0.1).
desktop.error_apt_locked: Another apt/dpkg process is using the package manager. Wait for it to finish, then retry.
desktop.error_apt_failed: System package installation failed. Check apt logs and retry.
desktop.error_subprocess_stream: Install output was interrupted. The install may still be running on the server.

bind_host.fail: bind_host is {bind_host}; set to 0.0.0.0 in config.json

tls_enabled.fail: TLS is already enabled; configure dual-port renewal (443 + HTTP 80)

port.fail: Port is {port}; set port to {http_port} and restart before first issuance

port_443.ok: Port {https_port} is available for HTTPS after issuance
port_443.fail: Port {https_port} is in use by another process

public_ip.fail: Could not determine this host's public IP (check outbound HTTPS)

tls.preflight_failed_summary: One or more preflight checks failed

probe.invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials — check the App ID and App Secret

agent_errors.no_models_configured: No models are configured. Go to Settings → Models to add a Provider, then enable this expert again.
agent_errors.model_ref_unavailable: The default model is unavailable or disabled. Check Settings → Models or update this expert's default model, then try again.

attachment.image_unavailable: [Attachment] Image could not be loaded for the model.

proactive_care.system_prompt:
Today is {today}.

Based on the user's recent life events, write a warm and natural caring message in no more than 150 words.
Pay attention to when events occurred — do not describe something from a few days ago as happening "today".
Do not mention that you are an AI; express care directly.
proactive_care.system_prompt_with_soul:
{soul_md}

---

Today is {today}.

Based on the user's recent life events, write a warm and natural caring message in no more than 150 words.
Pay attention to when events occurred — do not describe something from a few days ago as happening "today".
Do not mention that you are an AI; express care directly.
